title: Plant
description: One plant as the Verdant mock API returns it (fictional demo data). The card binds a subset (see the spec's Data binding); care-task-row references plants by id. Derived fields are baked against the scenario's fixed fictional today (the brief's head).

health.description: long-run condition — distinct from status, which is care urgency

status.description: worst status among the plant's not-done care tasks, derived against the fictional today

photoUrl.description: site-relative image path; optional — never present in the demo data (no image assets in fixtures), so the card's monogram placeholder is the exercised path
